    Cookie Policy

    How theRec.site uses cookies and similar technologies.

    1. Overview

    This Cookie Policy explains how theRec.site uses cookies and similar technologies (such as local storage) when you visit or use our website and application.

    2. Essential cookies

    • Authentication and session cookies to keep you signed in securely
    • Security cookies to help protect accounts and prevent abuse
    • Preference cookies such as language selection

    3. Analytics cookies

    • Help us understand how features are used so we can improve performance and usability
    • Collected in aggregate where possible and not sold to third parties for advertising

    4. Managing cookies

    You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may affect sign-in and core functionality. For questions, contact support@updates.therec.site.

    © 2026 theRec. All rights reserved.
